meaning: n.[植]南洋杉属树(原产南半球)
examples: It claims the world's only parasitic conifer and nearly two-thirds off the world's species of Araucaria trees, all of which are endemic.
The crossword in the Guardian was set by the Reverend John Graham, 91, known as Araucaria.
In his clue, he said Araucaria had 18 down of the 19, which is being treated with 13-15.
His pseudonym Araucaria is the Latin name for monkey puzzle tree.
